no: D2 Workshop Kits by Dan_P. Three component groups: (1) Kit Updater (cn:90-95) — standalone utility that fixes HLA tables and proficiencies for ALL kits in the game, should install AFTER all kit mods. (2) Workshop Kitpack (cn:9999-10001) — 17 Soulsborne-inspired kits. (3) Item Pack (cn:10-11) — themed items. Kit Updater is multi-cat to POST-TACTICAL TWEAKS for correct install order.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Kit Updater option 6 can restore ToF backup before edits. Install D2WK after all kit mods, before ToF.
Kit Updater has a dedicated 5E casting option. Use this if running SubtleD's 5E casting mod.

passive.desc: Fighter/multi. +3 vs lycanthropes/fiends. Hunter Tools (acid). Quicksilver (ranged enhancement). Max studded leather.

spellRestrictions.note: Multi-class kit. Combines fighter combat with mage spells.

passive.desc: Fighter/multi. Missile defense. Grand Mastery ranged. Shockwave, Incinerate.

restrictions.items: Cannot specialize melee or fighting styles.

spellRestrictions.note: Multi-class fighter/mage variant.

passive.desc: Ranger/multi. +4 save vs death. Casts arcane as priest. Denial (death immunity + heal).

spellRestrictions.note: Multi-class with arcane-as-priest casting.

passive.desc: Ranger/multi. Moonscar (save bonuses). Torrent (haste on hit). Moonlight Vortex (magic beam, strong vs undead).

restrictions.items: AC penalty vs slash/pierce. Reduced stealth.

spellRestrictions.note: Cleric/Ranger multi with Moonlight abilities.

passive.desc: Paladin/multi. Arcane spells as priest. Rooting Shot (entangle). Bloodletter (lifesteal + bleed).

spellRestrictions.note: Paladin multi with arcane-as-priest casting.

passive.desc: Paladin/multi. Force (stun shockwave). 3x Lay On Hands. Bolt of Glory at lv9. High Mastery polearms/blunt.

restrictions.items: No ranged specialization. Turns undead 2 levels lower.

spellRestrictions.note: Paladin multi with Temple Knight abilities.

passive.desc: Mage/multi. Elemental resistance scaling to 30%. Unleash Magic (reverse resist for dmg). Twisted Barricade. -2 STR/CON.

spellRestrictions.note: Multi-class fighter/mage variant.

passive.desc: Sorcerer/multi. Immune to spell failure/silence/deafness. 8 unique spells. Interference. -2 DEX/WIS.

spellRestrictions.note: Multi-class sorcerer variant.

passive.desc: Cleric. Immune to level drain/poison/disease. 4 Blood Transfusion types (healing, beast, madman, lead).

restrictions.items: Cannot wear magic gauntlets or bracers.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard cleric spells + 4 Blood Transfusion types (healing, beast, madman, lead).

statBonus.note: Immune to level drain/poison/disease. Cannot wear magic gauntlets or bracers.

passive.desc: Thief. Bonus vs humanoids. Splintering Shot (burst). Visceral Attack (crit + lifesteal).

spellRestrictions.note: Thief kit, no spells. Splintering Shot/Visceral Attack innates.

statBonus.note: Bonus vs humanoids. 20 skill pts/level. No Set Snare.

passive.desc: Bard. Fire resist scaling to 50%. 4 unique songs (Blasting, Booming, Dust Explosion, Frenzying Flame).

restrictions.items: Bard Song disabled 8 rounds after use. 1/4 Pick Pockets.

spellRestrictions.note: Bard kit. 4 unique songs (Blasting/Booming/Dust Explosion/Frenzying Flame). Bard Song disabled 8 rounds after use.

statBonus.note: Fire resist scales to 50%. 1/4 Pick Pockets.

passive.desc: Ranger. Immune to Grease/Web/Entangle. Faster movement. Evasion. Progressive AC bonus.

spellRestrictions.note: No ranger spells. Immune to Grease/Web/Entangle. Evasion passive.

statBonus.note: Faster movement. Progressive AC bonus. Leather/hide only.

passive.desc: Monk. Ki Energy with passive regen. 5 Medic Arts (healing, remedies, Dragonrot damage).

restrictions.items: 8 skill pts/level. No Stunning Blow or Quivering Palm.

spellRestrictions.note: Monk kit, no spells. Ki Energy with passive regen. 5 Medic Arts.

statBonus.note: 8 skill pts/level. No Stunning Blow or Quivering Palm.

passive.desc: Paladin. Ranged bonuses. Grand Mastery bows/crossbows. Blood Bullet (HP sacrifice for damage).

restrictions.items: Cannot specialize melee or fighting styles.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard paladin spells. Blood Bullet (HP sacrifice for damage).

statBonus.note: Splint mail max. Cannot specialize melee or fighting styles.

passive.desc: Fighter. Backstab immunity. Ghostwalker (mirror images). Critical Boost (melee enhancement).

spellRestrictions.note: Fighter kit, no spells. Backstab immunity. Ghostwalker (mirror images).

passive.desc: Single-class Fighter version of Beast Hunter.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard fighter abilities + Hunter Tools (acid). No spells.

passive.desc: Single-class Fighter version of Warhound.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard fighter abilities + Shockwave/Incinerate. No spells.

statBonus.note: Missile defense bonuses. Cannot specialize melee or fighting styles.

passive.desc: Single-class Ranger version of Grave Warden.

spellRestrictions.note: Casts arcane spells as priest (unique system). +4 save vs death.

statBonus.note: +4 save vs death. Chain mail max. Non-evil non-chaotic. No Charm Animal.

passive.desc: Single-class Ranger version of Moonlight Knight.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard ranger spells + Moonlight Vortex (magic beam vs undead).

statBonus.note: AC penalty vs slash/pierce. Reduced stealth.

passive.desc: Single-class Paladin version of Confessor.

spellRestrictions.note: Casts arcane spells as priest (unique system). Standard paladin restrictions.

statBonus.note: Studded leather max. No Lay On Hands.

passive.desc: Single-class Paladin version of Temple Knight.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard paladin spells + Force shockwave + 3x Lay On Hands. Bolt of Glory at lv9.

statBonus.note: High Mastery polearms/blunt. No ranged specialization. Turns undead 2 levels lower.

passive.desc: Single-class Mage version of War Magician.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard mage spells + Unleash Magic (reverses elemental resistances for damage).

statBonus.note: -2 STR, -2 CON. Elemental resistance scales to 30%.

passive.desc: Single-class Sorcerer version of Starjammer.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard sorcerer spells + 8 unique custom spells. Immune to spell failure/silence/deafness.

new: Wherever there are beasts, there are hunters. Specialized beast-slaying ranger.
Armored soldier specializing in long-range warfare with crossbows and firearms.
Tends to tombs of the slumbering dead, ensuring they remain undisturbed.
Forlorn warrior branded by the Moonscar, dreaming of endless moonlit vistas.
Paladin acting on behalf of a patron church, adept at hunting heretics.
Heavily-clad knight guarding the sanctity of temples and churches.
Draws out and amplifies innate magical energies for devastating combat magic.
Drifter from beyond the stars who escaped a great Evil. Cosmic arcane magic.
Heretical healer practicing blood ministration. Medical magic through vital fluids.
Acts swiftly and mercilessly against the chosen mark. Precision assassin.
Bard faction known for intricate mechanical devices and explosive performances.
Aimless wanderer at home in adverse terrain. Survival and adaptability.
Skilled medical practitioner and warrior with extensive healing training.
Scion of a respectable line with faith in their pedigree. Noble combat training.
Highly capable versatile warrior leading with burst attacks and tactical speed.

sum: 17 Soulsborne-inspired kits with multiclass variants, 30+ items, and a Kit Updater that fixes proficiency/HLA conflicts with other mods.

co.n: Kit Updater: All updates + config options (recommended)
co.scn: Kit Updater (Safe to install at end of order. Can be re-run at any time.)
co.no: Kit Updater: ALL fixes. Scans kitlist.2da and rebuilds HLA tables, fixes proficiencies, updates mod compatibility for ALL kits in the game (not just Workshop Kits). Uses NO_LOG_RECORD — can be re-run anytime. Should install AFTER all other kit mods. Backs up weapprof.2da, m_dw_hld.lua (ToF feats). Recommended option.

co.scn: Kit Updater (Safe to install at end of order. Can be re-run at any time.)

co.n: Medic stuff - fixes skill points, updates Medic Arts, config options
co.tp2n: Medic stuff - fixes skill points, updates Medic Arts, config options
co.scn: Kit Updater (Safe to install at end of order. Can be re-run at any time.)

co.n: Proficiencies - fixes issues, updates all kits
co.tp2n: Proficiencies - fixes issues, updates all kits
co.scn: Kit Updater (Safe to install at end of order. Can be re-run at any time.)

co.n: for 5e casting by subtledoctor (tweak spell slots)
co.tp2n: for 5e casting by subtledoctor (tweak spell slots)
co.scn: Kit Updater (Safe to install at end of order. Can be re-run at any time.)

co.n: Option 1, but restore ToF backup before edits (m_dw_hld.lua)
co.tp2n: Option 1, but restore ToF backup before edits (m_dw_hld.lua)
co.scn: Kit Updater (Safe to install at end of order. Can be re-run at any time.)

co.n: Workshop Kitpack: Base kits + multiclass variants
co.no: Workshop Kitpack: 17 Soulsborne-inspired kits (Bloodborne Hunter, Dark Souls warrior types, etc.) with multiclass variants. Adds 15 kit slots. Independent of Kit Updater.

co.n: Misc items only (no kits or Hunter Badges)
co.tp2n: Misc items only (no kits or Hunter Badges)

co.no: Item Pack: Standard install. Adds Soulsborne-themed weapons, armor, and accessories to shops. Requires Workshop Kitpack (any variant). Normal gameplay.

Kit Updater: HLA tables only. Recreates HLA tables for all kits by scanning kitlist.2da. Fixes kits that got broken HLA tables from install order issues. Standalone — does not require Workshop Kitpack. Should install AFTER all kit mods.
Kit Updater: Medic-specific fixes only. Updates Medic Arts ability and fixes skill points for the Workshop Medic kit. Only useful if Workshop Kitpack is installed.
Kit Updater: Proficiency fixes only. Fixes proficiency table issues for kits that have conflicts. Standalone — works for any kit mods.
Kit Updater: For SubtleD's 5E Casting mod. Tweaks spell slots to work with 5E-style casting system. Requires 5E Spellcasting mod installed.

co.n: Kit Updater: All updates + restore ToF backup
co.no: Kit Updater: All fixes + restores ToF backup of m_dw_hld.lua before making edits. Use if ToF is installed and you want to preserve its feat configuration as a baseline.
Workshop Kitpack: Base kits only (no multiclass variants). Adds 8 kit slots. Fewer kits = less kit cap impact.

co.n: Workshop Kitpack: Misc items only (no kits)
co.no: Workshop Kitpack: Misc items only — Soulsborne-themed items without any kits. Adds 6 kit slots (items that use kit slots for internal tracking). No actual character kits.

co.n: Item Pack: Dev mode (start with Item Sack)
co.no: Item Pack: Dev/debug mode. Starts with an Item Sack containing all items. For testing only — not for normal gameplay.
